title: centaurea boissieri subsp. funkii
intro: Centaurea boissieri subsp. funkii, also known as Boissier's knapweed, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and digestive problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Centaurea boissieri subsp. funkii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal and health benefits.
